title: Image To Image Personal Style Consulting Board AI
sourceTitle: Image To Image Personal Style Consulting Board AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image personal image diagnosis consulting board for adult woman with soft round face, warm skin tone, shoulder-length dark hair, and approachable workplace presence, preserving the uploaded face identity while presenting a refined styling analysis. Subject: adult woman with soft round face, warm skin tone, shoulder-length dark hair, and approachable workplace presence remains the same person from the uploaded photo, with face features, face shape, skin tone, body proportions, and natural expression preserved while skin is gently cleaned without changing identity. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Fixed modular information-board composition: refined portrait crop as the anchor, portrait crop, face-shape notes, hairstyle suggestions, frame comparison, color swatches, outfit dos and donts arranged as rounded analysis panels, visual callouts, comparison blocks, and compact label hierarchy. Signature Elements: portrait crop, face-shape notes, hairstyle suggestions, frame comparison, color swatches, outfit dos and donts, face-shape notes, hairstyle direction, frame or outfit comparison, color swatches, modular rounded panels, and concise professional guidance. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Soft neutral consulting palette with warm skin-friendly tones, clean white or pale background surfaces, muted accent swatches, and restrained dark text for legibility. Lighting: Soft flattering studio light that keeps the uploaded facial structure believable, with gentle skin cleanup, natural shadows, and clean board readability. Camera: Reference-preserving portrait crop based on the uploaded photo, keeping the source face angle and recognizable proportions while fitting the 3:4 consulting-board layout. Typography: Short Chinese labels name each advisory module; headings, tags, and callouts stay brief, structured, and easy to scan. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
